title: Product A US clinics hero — temporary placeholder (retired)
description: Temporary governed placeholder for the Product A / US clinics hero background (/product-a/us-clinics). Warm, calm premium treatment-room visual: deep espresso base with a soft amber window-light source, blush highlights, low-contrast furniture forms, and a hint of botanical calm — clear tonal variation so the frosted-glass panels read against it. Vector-only, CorpFlowAI-authored, no people and no clinical/medical detail. Replace with a vetted premium medspa/aesthetic-clinic interior photograph (stock_licensed or ai_generated with provenance) before production launch.

licence.terms: CorpFlowAI-authored vector placeholder. No third-party IP, no stock, no AI generation. Temporary; replace per the replacement note in usage.notes and bump the id on replacement (never overwrite a published path).

accessibility.alt: Warm, calm premium treatment room lit by soft amber light, suggesting an elegant clinic environment.

usage.primary_cta: Request a Website & Lead Rescue Audit
